rules: [P1] Base protocol decisions on the charted result plus reference range or explicit task/protocol threshold; apply thresholds exactly, including boundary values, and do not assume generic cutoffs.
[P1] Complete all requested steps, including conditional follow-up actions, not just the initial lookup.

[P1] For patient-specific tasks, verify the patient in the authoritative chart using all provided identifiers/demographics, exhaust reasonable search methods including identifier-format variations (e.g., prefixed/unprefixed MRN), and explicitly report not found only after no match is found.
[P1] When asked for a lab result, return the requested value and its recorded datetime.

[P1] For lab-result retrieval, verify the patient first, confirm the exact requested analyte and specimen, search relevant aliases/result sources, apply any stated time window, and use the latest qualifying result by exact timestamp; if none qualifies, explicitly report unavailable.

[P1] For write actions, execute the requested chart/order action for the verified patient, record user-provided measurements exactly as given, and confirm completion only after success; do not substitute a note or restate intent.
[P1] When an action depends on a lab-driven protocol, map the verified most recent qualifying result to the exact protocol dosing/action table before deciding.
[P1] Verify any required recency window before acting; if the latest qualifying result is too old, place the protocol-specified repeat/follow-up lab order instead of treating it as current.
[P1] When protocol criteria are unmet, withhold the action and state explicitly that no order was placed.

[P1] Apply conditional treatment only when the required trigger is confirmed on the most recent qualifying result; when triggered, place the treatment and any protocol-linked follow-up orders with the exact specified timing.
[P1] Anchor relative scheduling instructions to the relevant event datetime and convert them to the exact intended calendar datetime before finalizing.
[P1] Do not guess or infer requested values or demographic details; report unavailable when not explicitly in the chart.
[P1] Include all mandated free-text elements verbatim and preserve the requested structure when specified.
[P1] Compute age from the charted date of birth at answer time.
[P1] Match the requested order type exactly.
